h2: Keep in touch on social media
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Jo Stevens Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate About Me Privacy Policy – Jo Stevens MP Office Standards Policy Website & Social Media Policy In Parliament News from Parliament News from Across Wales Policy Views Middle East Statements In Cardiff East Constituency News Annual Reports Keep in touch Monthly Newsletters Advice Surgeries Visiting Parliament Cost-of-Living Advice Hub More Search Search the website Search Menu Advice Surgeries As well as my work in Parliament, my office and I are available to help constituents all year round, with a range of issues, including for example benefit entitlements, HMRC issues, housing, home office and passport issues. If you need any help with any issue, or require an appointment please contact us via phone ( 02921 329736 ) or email ( [email protected] ) and a member of my team will be happy to help. I hold regular Advice surgeries. These are an opportunity for any resident living in Cardiff East to come and chat with me about any issue you might need assistance with or, to ask any question you have about my work in Parliament and here, on your behalf. Please call the office on the number above to make an appointment or fill in the form below: How Can I Help - Surgery Form First Name (Required) Last Name (Required) Address (Required) Strict Parliamentary protocol states that a Member of Parliament can only act on the behalf of their own constituents and not the constituents of other MPs. If you live outside Cardiff East constituency, you can find your MP and their contact details here: http://www.parliament.uk/mps-lords-and-offices/mps Street Address Address Line 2 City Postcode Email Address Telephone Number (Required) How can I help? Consent View the privacy policy here: https://www.jostevens.co.uk/privacy-policy-jo-stevens-mp/ I agree to the Privacy Policy CAPTCHA Keep in touch on social media Contact details 116 Albany Road, Cardiff, UK View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Ian Bounds, on behalf of Jo Stevens, both at 116 Albany Road, Cardiff, CF24 3RU. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
